tasks.label: sim:ez:build
tasks.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_ez.vvp testbench_ez.v picorv32.v

tasks.label: sim:cpu:build
tasks.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp testbench_cpu.v picorv32.v

tasks.label: run:cpu:one-click
tasks.command: wsl --cd ${input:projectRootWsl}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main make firmware/firmware.hex TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX=${input:toolchainPrefix}; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp testbench_cpu.v picorv32.v; vvp -N .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp +firmware=${input:firmwarePath} +maxcycles=${input:maxCycles}

tasks.label: run:iverilog:one-click
tasks.command: wsl --cd ${input:projectRootWsl}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main make firmware/firmware.hex TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX=${input:toolchainPrefix}; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp testbench_cpu.v picorv32.v; vvp -N .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp +firmware=${input:firmwarePath} +maxcycles=${input:maxCycles}

tasks.label: run:iverilog:one-click:wave
tasks.command: wsl --cd ${input:projectRootWsl}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main make firmware/firmware.hex TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX=${input:toolchainPrefix}; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp testbench_cpu.v picorv32.v; vvp -N .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp +vcd +firmware=${input:firmwarePath} +maxcycles=${input:maxCycles}; gtkwave testbench_cpu.vcd

tasks.label: run:iverilog:wave:selftest
tasks.command: Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp testbench_cpu.v picorv32.v; vvp -N .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp +vcd +selftest_alu +maxcycles=5000; gtkwave testbench_cpu.vcd

tasks.label: run:iverilog:wave:firmware
tasks.command: wsl --cd ${input:projectRootWsl}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main make firmware/firmware.hex TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX=${input:toolchainPrefix}; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp testbench_cpu.v picorv32.v; vvp -N .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp +vcd +firmware=${input:firmwarePath} +maxcycles=${input:maxCycles}; gtkwave testbench_cpu.vcd

tasks.label: run:iverilog:wave:long
tasks.command: wsl --cd ${input:projectRootWsl}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main make firmware/firmware.hex TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX=${input:toolchainPrefix}; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/picorv32-main/picorv32-main"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force .sim | Out-Null; iverilog -g2012 -o .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp testbench_cpu.v picorv32.v; vvp -N .sim/testbench_cpu.vvp +vcd +ignore_exit +ignore_trap +firmware=${input:firmwarePath} +maxcycles=${input:maxCyclesLong}; gtkwave testbench_cpu.vcd

inputs.description: Firmware hex path relative to picorv32-main/picorv32-main
Max simulation cycles for long waveform run
Absolute path to vivado launcher (vivado.bat recommended)
Firmware hex path for Vivado (absolute path recommended)
Max simulation cycles for Vivado run
